fields.title: Full-Stack Developer
fields.summary: Full-stack developer with 1+ year building production fintech systems (React/TypeScript, ASP.NET Core, MongoDB); experienced in OAuth integrations, async messaging, and scalable API design.

fields.description: Working under the Acting Office project within the Self Assessment team, handling full-stack development responsibilities across both frontend and backend.

fields.title: MTD-IT Module
fields.content: Developed from scratch using ASP.NET Core and React + TypeScript, integrating with HMRC's Making Tax Digital REST APIs via OAuth 2.0 to enable end-to-end self-assessment tax preparation and submission for 200+ users, eliminating manual HMRC filing.
fields.skills_used: ASP.NET Core, React, TypeScript, OAuth 2.0, REST APIs

fields.title: P11D Data Request Module
fields.content: Built with a full expense submission and multi-level admin approval workflow; automated P11D return generation post-approval using ASP.NET Core business logic and MongoDB aggregation pipelines, reducing manual reconciliation effort by 70%.

fields.title: Microsoft Azure
fields.content: Worked with Azure Service Bus to process multiple async events/month for event-driven processing and Blob Storage for document management in a production environment to support scalable payroll and tax workflows.
fields.skills_used: Azure Service Bus, Azure Blob Storage

fields.title: System Design
fields.content: Contributed to HLD and LLD discussions for 2 scalable payroll and tax modules, applying microservices patterns, async messaging with Azure Service Bus, and RESTful API design principles.
fields.skills_used: System Design, Microservices, Azure Service Bus, REST APIs

fields.title: Data Analysis
fields.content: Managed program datasets and built a Power BI dashboard to analyze Startup-Yatra and Startup-Xpress outcomes.

fields.title: Recall
fields.subtitle: Full-Stack Chrome Extension & Web App
fields.description: Built a full-stack Chrome extension and web app using Django REST Framework and React that schedules reminders for links, todos, notes, videos, jobs, and purchases.
fields.tech_stack: Django REST Framework, React, MySQL, JWT, Google OAuth

fields.title: Interview Question Scraper
fields.subtitle: Flask Web Scraper
fields.description: Developed a Python Flask scraper to extract interview questions from JavaTpoint and save the results in multiple formats including MS Word, PDF, and CSV for easy download and review.
fields.tech_stack: Python, Flask, BeautifulSoup, MySQL, CSV, PDF

fields.title: Easy Shop Platform
fields.subtitle: Django E-Commerce Clone
fields.description: Built a user-friendly multi-user e-commerce app with Django, allowing users to register, login, browse products, add items to cart, place orders, and manage their session flow.

fields.title: Real-Time Chat App
fields.subtitle: Django Channels Messaging
fields.description: Created a real-time chat application using Django Channels and WebSockets for instant communication across authenticated users with independent logouts.
fields.tech_stack: Django, Django Channels, HTML, Bootstrap, WebSockets

fields.title: Authentication
fields.content: Implemented secure JWT authentication alongside Google OAuth via the Chrome Identity API, verifying tokens on the backend to link accounts and isolate user-specific data.

fields.title: Notifications
fields.content: Developed a Chrome service worker featuring alarm-based polling, dynamic badges, and a stateful notification system that tracks alerts (Pending, Sent, Acknowledged) and auto-re-fires dismissed reminders after a 5-minute cooldown.

fields.title: UI & Deployment
fields.content: Maintained codebase with responsive CSS to support both a full browser view and a compact 360px popup layout; deployed the backend and MySQL database on Railway, with the extension source maintained on GitHub.

fields.title: Data Extraction
fields.content: Scraped structured interview questions from a public website and normalized the content into a database for reliable querying, filtering, and export.

fields.title: Export Formats
fields.content: Added export support for DOCX, PDF, and CSV so users can download question sets in their preferred format for offline study and sharing.

fields.title: Shopping Workflow
fields.content: Implemented product browsing, cart management, order placement, and checkout workflows with clear user feedback and session persistence.

fields.title: Auth & UX
fields.content: Supported registration, login, logout, and account-specific order history to create a realistic multi-user shopping experience.

fields.title: Real-Time Messaging
fields.content: Built WebSocket-based message delivery with Django Channels to enable chat rooms, live typing indicators, and message broadcasting.

fields.title: Session Management
fields.content: Handled user authentication, independent logout, and real-time session updates to keep chats secure and responsive.

fields.title: Networking
fields.content: Led the networking team and collaborated with other college cells for mini level project development.

fields.title: Training
fields.content: Conducted doubt clearing sessions to resolve technical queries for students.

fields.title: Won the Database Management Competition at the BPUT Tech Carnival
fields.description: Competed and won first place in the Database Management Competition.
